...

...

...

...

...
Data Solution Architect – design the “big picture” technical architecture of data analytics products.
...
Senior Analyst – work with business leaders to identify, plan, and prioritize advanced analytics use cases.

office 2 days per week. If you have questions about these positions, feel free to reach out to me directly.

We're looking for a creative leader for our product management team. Lead a diverse team that oversees the development of enterprise data analytics solutions. The role can be located in New Orleans, LA or The Woodlands, TX. Here's a summary of the job and a link to the job posting. 

The senior manager of analytics product management is a key leadership role in our product delivery function within the analytics organization. The senior manager will be responsible for overseeing the design and creation of all insightful analytics products and solutions for internal business customers. The senior manager of product management will lead a team consisting of a product designer, solution architect, an automation analyst, and multiple product managers. The senior manager is responsible for consistent, customer centric analytics solutions across all product teams. Individual product managers will lead product teams organized into “analytics pods.” Each pod will be comprised of multiple roles from both the analytics team and the business organizations, including data scientists, data engineers, and business subject matter experts.

Activity: Chris Jeansonne liked
...
Some huge moves happening across Mississippi right now from Entergy .
...
The company recently announced plans for the new Vicksburg Advanced Power Station, a 754MW combined-cycle combustion turbine facility designed to support growing electricity demand across the state.
...
Alongside the previously announced plants in Greenville and Ridgeland, it’s a serious amount of new infrastructure being developed to support roughly 459,000 customers across Mississippi.
...
What stands out most is the scale of investment and long-term planning utilities are now having to make as demand continues to grow across the US.
...
Projects like these don’t just happen overnight either.
...
The amount of engineering, construction, commissioning, operations and maintenance work required behind the scenes must be enormous.
...
Feels like businesses like Entergy are playing a massive role in shaping the next phase of US power infrastructure. #PowerGeneration #Energy #Infrastructure #Utilities #CombinedCycle #GasTurbine #Commissioning #Engineering #Construction #Mississippi #USPower #Entergy
...
Meet Rick Johnson , sustainability and climate strategy leader at Entergy , and one of the voices you’ll hear at @US BCSD’s Annual Meeting on June 10th in The Woodlands, TX.
...
Rick has spent 25 years at Entergy building expertise in sustainability, climate strategy, and stakeholder collaboration, working across customers, regulators, investors, and community groups to advance clean energy transition and customer-centric solutions.
...
At this year’s meeting, Rick will be exploring a question that sits at the heart of everything we do: what role should collaboration — across industries, governments, and communities — play in accelerating sustainable transformation? He’ll be drawing on real-world examples from the Sustainable Ohio Byproduct Synergy project and the Carbon Collaborative to bring that question to life.

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Develop AI and ML
...
energy and utility sector
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
